data.title: BH Macro Limited Announces Share Buyback on London Stock Exchange
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

BH Macro Shs GBP ( (GB:BHMG) ) just unveiled an update.

BH Macro Limited, a closed-ended collective investment scheme, has announced the purchase of 97,854 of its ordinary shares from J.P. Morgan Securities plc on the London Stock Exchange. The transaction reflects the company’s strategy to manage its share capital by holding the purchased shares in treasury, affecting the total number of voting rights in the company which now stands at 524,533,336.

More about BH Macro Shs GBP

data.title: GCP Infra Announces Share Repurchase to Optimize Capital Structure
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP ( (GB:GCP) ) has shared an update.

GCP Infrastructure Investments Limited announced the repurchase of 100,000 ordinary shares, utilizing the authority granted by shareholders to make market purchases. These shares will be held in treasury, impacting the total voting rights available for shareholder notifications. This move reflects the company’s ongoing strategy to manage its capital structure effectively, aligning with its focus on infrastructure investments with stable, long-term revenues.

More about GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP

GCP Infra is a closed-ended investment company listed on the London Stock Exchange as part of the FTSE-250. The company focuses on providing long-term distributions to shareholders and preserving capital by investing in UK infrastructure debt and similar assets. It targets infrastructure projects with public sector-backed revenues and seeks to benefit from partial inflation protection. GCP Infra is recognized for its environmental contributions with the London Stock Exchange’s Green Economy Mark.

YTD Price Performance: 5.00%

Average Trading Volume: 1,170,154

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

See more insights into GCP stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Ashtead Group Executes Share Repurchase in Ongoing Buyback Program
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Ashtead ( (GB:AHT) ) just unveiled an update.

Ashtead Group plc announced the repurchase of 40,000 ordinary shares as part of its $1.5 billion share repurchase program. This transaction, conducted on December 19, 2024, involved shares priced between 4,968 pence and 5,080 pence and was facilitated by Barclays Bank PLC. The transaction reduces the number of ordinary shares in issue to 437,019,084, impacting shareholder calculations under the Disclosure and Transparency Rules.

More about Ashtead

Ashtead Group plc operates in the equipment rental industry, providing a range of rental solutions to various sectors. The company focuses on offering rental services and equipment primarily in the US, UK, and Canadian markets.

Crescent NV has announced that the joint shareholding of Alychlo NV and Mr. Marc Coucke has fallen below the 3% threshold, following a reduction in their voting rights from 97.73 million to 56.76 million shares. This change reflects a significant shift in the company’s shareholder structure, indicating potential strategic adjustments by Alychlo NV and Mr. Coucke.

data.title: Windward Ltd. Corrects Administrative Error in PDMR Dealing Notifications
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Windward Ltd. ( (GB:WNWD) ) has shared an update.

Windward Ltd. announced an amendment to several PDMR (Persons Discharging Managerial Responsibilities) dealing notifications. An administrative error led to an unawareness of automatic share sales by Matan Peled to cover tax liabilities from vesting Restricted Share Units. This announcement replaces previous details shared on multiple dates in 2024. The adjustments align with the UK Market Abuse Regulation.

More about Windward Ltd.

Windward Ltd. is a publicly-traded company on the London Stock Exchange, specializing in Maritime AI. The company provides AI-powered solutions that enable organizations such as banks, commodity traders, insurers, and major energy and shipping companies to make real-time, predictive decisions. Windward’s technology offers a comprehensive view of the maritime ecosystem, impacting safety, security, finance, and business operations.

data.title: Euronet Worldwide Expands Credit Facility for Growth
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

The latest update is out from Euronet Worldwide ( (EEFT) ).

Euronet Worldwide has amended its unsecured revolving credit facility, raising the total amount from $1.25 billion to $1.9 billion and extending the maturity date to December 2029. This adjustment, supported by a syndicate of domestic and international financial institutions, enhances Euronet’s capital flexibility, allowing the company to pursue growth opportunities and deliver increased value to shareholders.

More about Euronet Worldwide

Euronet Worldwide, Inc. is a global leader in electronic payments and financial technology solutions, providing services such as money transfers, credit and debit card processing, ATMs, POS services, and foreign currency exchange. Operating in over 200 countries, Euronet has developed an extensive payments network including thousands of ATMs and POS terminals, serving diverse markets from its headquarters in Leawood, Kansas.

data.title: Metro Bank Strengthens Board with New Appointment
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Metro Bank ( (GB:MTRO) ) has issued an update.

Metro Bank has appointed Paul Coby as an independent Non-Executive Director, effective from December 30, 2024. Coby, a seasoned CIO with a distinguished record in digital transformation, brings valuable technology and leadership experience to the board. This appointment aims to strengthen Metro Bank’s board as it embarks on a new growth phase. The board, post-appointment, will consist of five independent Non-Executive Directors, three shareholder-nominated Non-Executive Directors, and two Executive Directors, marking a strategic enhancement in governance structure.

More about Metro Bank

Metro Bank is an independent UK bank known for its exceptional customer experience across retail, business, commercial, and private banking services. It offers various banking options through its 75 stores, UK-based contact centres, and award-winning mobile app. Established in England and Wales, the bank is celebrated for its service quality, having originated over £10bn in commercial lending. It has received multiple awards, such as ‘Large Loans Mortgage Lender of the Year’ and ‘Best Business Credit Card’. Metro Bank stands out for its commitment to inclusivity and diversity.

YTD Price Performance: 154.86%

Average Trading Volume: 1,562,393

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell
